description_long: This is a metallic ring featuring a prominent, faceted, deep magenta gemstone set in a raised bezel at the center. The band is smooth and silvery, with a modern, slightly tapered shank that widens at the shoulders to support the central stone. On each side of the band, there is a smaller, round magenta gemstone embedded flush with the metal, adding symmetry and visual interest. The gemstones are cut with multiple facets, giving them a sparkling, reflective quality. The overall design is sleek and geometric, with clean lines and a focus on the contrast between the polished metal and the vibrant stones. The ring exudes a contemporary elegance suitable for both everyday wear and special occasions.
description: A sleek silver ring with a large faceted magenta gemstone at its center and two smaller matching stones set into the band. The design is modern and geometric, with a polished finish and vibrant color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large central magenta gemstone and one smaller side stone embedded in the band.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular band and the raised central gemstone, with both side stones partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the central gemstone and the opposite side stone in the band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the ring, showing the band curvature and the central gemstone with both side stones visible.
